hero.title: Ukuthuthukiswa kwesoftware yebhizinisi
hero.description: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zebhizinisi zokuphela kokuphela ezinezinhlaka zanamuhla, ukwakhiwa kwe-API kuqala, kanye ne-scalability yefu.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Lapho izinhlelo zebhizinisi zilahlekelwa khona isivinini, isabelomali, kanye nokuqondaniswa kwamasu

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiguqula ngayo izidingo ezingaqondakali zibe ngamapulatifomu alungele ukukhiqizwa

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Izinqumo zokuklama ezigcina izinhlelo zebhizinisi zigcinwa esikalini

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela ehlelekile kusuka ekutholeni kuya ekulethweni kokukhiqizwa okuzinzile

problem.overview: Amaqembu ebhizinisi avame ukuthwala ukuhamba komsebenzi okubucayi ezinhlelweni ezihlukanisiwe, ukudala izikhathi ezinde zokuhola, idatha engahambisani, nokusebenzisana kwezandla ezibizayo phakathi kweminyango.
painPoints: Ukuzibophezela kokulethwa kuyashelela ngoba ukuncika kuwo wonke amaqembu akulawulwa
I-logic yebhizinisi eliyisisekelo iphindwe kabili kuzo zonke iziteshi nemikhiqizo
Ukuhlanganiswa kwefa kwenza ukwethulwa kwesici esisha kube nobungozi obukhulu futhi buhamba kancane
impactSignals: Ukuhamba komgwaqo kwehla ngenkathi ukusetshenziswa kwemali yobunjiniyela kukhuphuka
Amaphutha abhekene namakhasimende akhuphuka ngezikhathi zokukhululwa
Izinqumo ziyancipha ngenxa yokubika kokusebenza okungahambisani

approach.overview: Senza ngokutholwa kokuqala kwezakhiwo, ukulethwa okuqhutshwa yinkontileka, nobunjiniyela bokukhishwa okulawulwayo ukuze inani lebhizinisi lithunyelwe ngezikhathi ezibikezelwayo.

pillars.title: Imodeli Yesizinda kanye Nezimo Eziboshwe
pillars.detail: Sibeka imephu yezizinda ukusula imingcele yesevisi ukunciphisa ukuhlanganiswa kweqembu futhi sicacise ubunikazi.

pillars.title: Isu lokuhlanganiswa kwe-API-First
pillars.detail: Sichaza izinkontileka ezinzile kusenesikhathi, okwenza ukuthuthukiswa okufanayo nokuhlanganiswa okuphephile nezinhlelo zebhizinisi.

pillars.title: Ukuhamba komsebenzi okuqhubekayo kokulethwa
pillars.detail: Sisebenzisa amafulegi wesici, ukukhishwa okuhleliwe, namasango ekhwalithi ukukhipha ngokushesha ngaphandle kokuphazamisa ukukhiqizwa.

principles.overview: Izinqumo zethu zokwakha zibeka phambili isikhathi eside, ukusebenza, nobunikazi obucacile ukuze amapulatifomu ahlale eguquguqukayo njengoba ububanzi bebhizinisi bukhula.

items.title: Imingcele Yesevisi Ye-Modular
items.detail: Amakhono ahlanganiswe azungeze izizinda zebhizinisi ukugcina umthelela wenguquko usendaweni.

items.title: Ukuhlanganiswa Okuqhutshwa Ngumcimbi
items.detail: Ukuhamba komsebenzi kwe-Asynchronous kusetshenziswa lapho ukubekezelelana kwe-latency kukhona ukuthuthukisa ukuqina nokuhlukanisa izinhlelo.

items.title: Ukubonwa ngokuklama
items.detail: Ukulandelela, amamethrikhi, kanye nezingodo ezihlelekile zichazwa ngaphambili ukusekela imisebenzi ethembekile nokuphathwa kwe-SLA.

breakdown.title: Ukutholwa Kwezakhiwo
breakdown.summary: Sibeka imephu yezinto eziza kuqala ebhizinisini, izingqinamba zobuchwepheshe, kanye nokwakhiwa okuhlosiwe ngaphambi kokuqala kokuqaliswa.

breakdown.title: Yakha & Ukuhlanganiswa
breakdown.summary: Amaqembu ethu asebenzisa izici eziyinhloko, izingqimba zokuhlanganisa, kanye nokuvikelwa kwekhwalithi ngokufana.
deliverables: Ukuhlanganiswa kwe-API kanye nokuhlanganiswa kweqembu lesithathu

breakdown.title: Qalisa nokuziphendukela kwemvelo
breakdown.summary: Ngemuva kokuhamba-bukhoma, sizinzisa imisebenzi futhi sichaze umjikelezo olandelayo wokuthuthuka ngokususelwa ekusetshenzisweni kwangempela.
deliverables: Umgwaqo we-post-launch kanye nokubuyiselwa emuva kokuthuthukiswa

cta.title: Ukulungele ukwakha uhlelo lwakho lokusebenza olulandelayo?
cta.description: Ake siklame futhi sithumele isixazululo esishayela imiphumela yebhizinisi elinganisekayo.

hero.title: I-AI, i-ML ne-Business Intelligence
hero.description: Kusuka kumamodeli wokubikezela kuya kumadeshibhodi abaphezulu, sakha izinhlelo eziphelele ze-AI / BI ezisekela izinqumo esikalini.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Kungani izinhlangano ezicebile zedatha zisalwela ukwenza izinqumo ezithembekile

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esisebenza ngayo imikhiqizo yedatha, amamodeli we-ML, kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi we-BI

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Amaphethini wedatha nemodeli yokwakhiwa kwesinqumo esithembekile

technology.title: Isitaki sethu sezobuchwepheshe
technology.subtitle: Amathuluzi ahamba phambili embonini yedatha ne-AI

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela Yokushintsha Kusuka Kwedatha Ehlukanisiwe Kuya Ekukhiqizeni Kwebanga Lokukhiqiza

problem.overview: Izinhlangano zivame ukuqoqa imithamo emikhulu yedatha kepha zehluleka ukuyihumusha ekubikezeleni okuthembekile, izinqumo zokusebenza, noma isenzo sebhizinisi esilinganiswayo.
painPoints: I-logic yokubika iyahlukahluka kuwo wonke amaqembu, okuholela ekulandiseni okuphikisanayo kwe-KPI
Amamodeli ahlala ekuvivinyweni futhi awalokothi afinyelele ekukhiqizeni komsebenzi
Izinkinga zekhwalithi yedatha zinciphisa ukwethenjwa kuma-analytics namadeshibhodi abaphathi
impactSignals: Imijikelezo yezinqumo ihamba kancane ngoba amaqembu aphikisana nokuqinisekiswa kwedatha esikhundleni sesenzo
Ukunemba kokubikezela nokuhlela kuhlala kungahambisani nekota ngaphezulu kwekota
Ukutshalwa kwezimali kwe-Analytics kukhombisa ukwamukelwa okuphansi ngaphandle kwamaqembu ahlaziyi akhethekile

approach.overview: Siletha amapulatifomu e-AI ne-BI njengezinhlelo zokukhiqiza, ukuhlanganisa ubunjiniyela bedatha, ukusebenza komjikelezo wempilo yemodeli, nokuhlanganiswa kokuhamba komsebenzi kwezinqumo.

pillars.title: Isisekelo somkhiqizo wedatha
pillars.detail: Imikhiqizo yedatha ehambisana nesizinda isungula okokufaka okusebenzisekayo, okulawulwayo, nokusezingeni eliphakeme kwe-analytics ne-ML.

pillars.title: I-MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Ukuqeqeshwa, ukuthunyelwa, ukuqapha, nokulawulwa kwe-drift kuzenzakalelayo ukugcina amamodeli athembekile ekukhiqizeni.

pillars.title: Ukuhlanganiswa kokuhamba komsebenzi kwesinqumo
pillars.detail: Ulwazi lufakwe kumathuluzi okusebenza namadeshibhodi ukuze amaqembu asebenze ngobuhlakani ngaphakathi kwezinqubo zansuku zonke.

principles.overview: Ukwakhiwa kwethu kwe-AI / BI kubeka phambili idatha ethembekile, amamodeli achazwayo, namaphethini wokufinyelela alawulwayo kulo lonke ibhizinisi.

items.title: Izincazelo ze-metric eyodwa
items.detail: Ama-KPI abucayi achazwa kanye ngamamodeli we-semantic ahlanganyelwe ukuqeda ukuphikisana komqondo wokubika.

items.title: Izilawuli Zokuthembeka Kwemodeli
items.detail: Imikhawulo yokusebenza, ukutholwa kwe-drift, kanye nezindlela zokubuyisela emuva zivikela ikhwalithi yezinqumo ekukhiqizeni.

items.title: Ukuphepha nokubusa ngokuklama
items.detail: Umugqa wedatha, ukufinyelela okususelwa endimeni, kanye nezilawuli ezilungele ukucwaningwa kwamabhuku zifakiwe kuwo wonke amapayipi.

breakdown.title: Isisekelo sedatha
breakdown.summary: Sihlola imithombo, sichaza izinkontileka zedatha, futhi sisungule ukubusa ukuze yonke imodeli iqale ngokufakwa okuthembekile.

breakdown.title: Model & Insight Delivery
breakdown.summary: Sakha amamodeli namadeshibhodi ezinqumo aboshelwe emibuzweni yebhizinisi elinganiswayo nama-KPI.

breakdown.title: I-MLOps kanye nokwamukelwa
breakdown.summary: Sisebenza ngokuthunyelwa, ukuqapha, nokunika amandla ithimba ukugcina imiphumela inokwethenjelwa ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
deliverables: Ukunikezelwa kweqembu kanye nencwadi yokudlala yokusebenza

cta.title: Guqula idatha yakho ibe yi-Insight
cta.description: Guqula idatha ehlukanisiwe ibe ubuhlakani obucacile, obusebenzayo.

hero.title: Ukwakhiwa Kwamafu Nengqalasizinda
hero.description: Amapulatifomu amafu amaningi, ukwakhiwa okuqinile, nengqalasizinda eguquguqukayo eyenzelwe ukukhula kwesikhathi eside.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Kungani imizamo yamafu imi ngemuva kwegagasi lokuqala lokufuduka

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiyakha ngayo amapulatifomu amafu aphephile, angaguquguquki anengozi elawulwayo yokufuduka

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Izinqumo zepulatifomu ezilinganisa ubuchule, ukuqina, nokubusa

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Ukulandelana okucacile kokuklama, ukufuduka, nokusebenza kwamapulatifomu amafu

problem.overview: Izinhlangano eziningi ziqedela ukufuduka kwamafu kokuqala kepha zisebenza njengamaqembu e-on-prem, ngokubonakala okungalungile, ukulawula okungahambisani, nokusetshenziswa kwemali okwandayo.
painPoints: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ihanjiswa ngaphandle kokuphepha okujwayelekile kanye nezilawuli zomphambo
Izindleko zamafu zikhula ngokushesha kunenani lebhizinisi elilethwa
Ukuhlinzekwa kwemvelo kuhlala kuyandla futhi kungahambisani kuwo wonke amaqembu
impactSignals: Izigameko ezivame ukubangelwa ukuphazamiseka kokucushwa phakathi kwezindawo
Ukulungela ukucwaningwa kwamabhuku kuyancipha ngenxa yemikhuba yokuphatha ehlukanisiwe
Izikhathi zokuhola zengqalasizinda zibambezela imizamo yomkhiqizo nedatha

approach.overview: Siklama amapulatifomu amafu njengemikhiqizo, sisebenzisa ukuzenzekelayo kwengqalasizinda, izivikelo zenqubomgomo, namagagasi okufuduka ahambisana nokubaluleka kwebhizinisi.

pillars.title: Indawo Yokwehla Njengekhodi
pillars.detail: Ubunikazi, ukuxhumana, ukuphepha, kanye nezisekelo zenqubomgomo zihlanganiswe ukuze ziphindaphindwe futhi zihlolwe.

pillars.title: Isu lokufuduka elisuselwa kumagagasi
pillars.detail: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ihamba ngezigaba ezilawulwayo ngokulandelana kokuncika nokulungela ukubuyisela emuva.

pillars.title: I-SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Izinkomba zokuthembeka kanye ne-unit-economics zibuyekezwa ndawonye ukuze kuthuthukiswe kokubili isikhathi sokuphumula kanye nokusebenza kahle.

principles.overview: Imodeli yethu yokwakha ithanda ingqalasizinda yokumemezela, ukufinyelela okuncane, namapulatifomu ahlanganisiwe asekela ukulethwa komkhiqizo okusheshayo.

items.title: Amaphethini wengqalasizinda engaguquki
items.detail: Izindawo zakhiwa kabusha kusuka kukhodi eguquliwe ukunciphisa ukuphazamiseka nokwenza lula ukululama kokusebenza.

items.title: Isisekelo Sezokuphepha ngokuzenzakalelayo
items.detail: Ukulawulwa kokufinyelela kwe-zero-trust kanye nokuphoqelelwa kwenqubomgomo kufakiwe kuwo wonke umjikelezo wokuphila kwemvelo.

items.title: Ukuqina ngokusabalalisa
items.detail: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ebucayi yenzelwe ukubekezelelana kokwehluleka kwezindawo eziningi noma izifunda eziningi lapho umthelela webhizinisi udinga.

breakdown.title: Ukwakhiwa Kwezakhiwo Nendawo Yokufika
breakdown.summary: Sichaza isimo esihlosiwe, ama-guardrails, kanye namazinga epulatifomu eyisisekelo ngaphambi kokuthi imithwalo yemisebenzi ihambe.

breakdown.title: Ukufuduka nokwakhiwa kwepulatifomu
breakdown.summary: Senza amagagasi okufuduka futhi siphakamise izingxenye zepulatifomu ye-cloud-native nge-automation ephindaphindwayo.

breakdown.title: Ukuthembeka kanye ne-FinOps
breakdown.summary: Sithuthukisa ukuthembeka kokusebenza futhi siqhubeke nokwandisa ukusetshenziswa kwamafu ngokususelwa ku-telemetry ebukhoma.
deliverables: Ama-SLOs, ukuqapha kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi kwezigameko
Izindleko zokubuyisela emuva kanye ne-cadence yokuphatha

cta.title: Linganisa ingqalasizinda yakho
cta.description: Yakha izisekelo zamafu ezihlala ziqinile ngaphansi komthwalo womhlaba wangempela.

hero.title: I-DevOps ne-Platform Engineering
hero.description: Amapayipi okulethwa okuzenzakalelayo, ukubona, kanye nemikhuba yepulatifomu ethuthukisa ijubane ngaphandle kokudela ukuthembeka.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Kungani ijubane lokulethwa lehla njengoba ubunzima bepulatifomu bukhula

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esilinganisa ngayo amapayipi okulethwa ngaphandle kokunciphisa amaqembu omkhiqizo

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Amaphethini wobunjiniyela bepulatifomu akhulisa ukuthembeka nokuzimela kweqembu

capabilities.title: Izinsizakalo ze-DevOps
capabilities.subtitle: Zenzekelayo, qaphe, futhi uthuthukise umjikelezo wakho wempilo yokulethwa

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Umgwaqo osebenzayo kusuka kumabhodlela okulethwa kuya ekugelezeni kokukhishwa okuphezulu

problem.overview: Izinhlangano zivame ukutshala imali kumathuluzi e-CI / CD kepha zisalwa nokukhishwa okungazinzile, ukuvunyelwa kancane, nobunikazi obuhlukanisiwe kuzo zonke izindawo.
painPoints: Izincazelo zamapayipi ziyahlukahluka ngeqembu, zidala amasango ekhwalithi angahambisani
Ukugunyazwa kokuthunyelwa ngesandla kubambezela i-hotfix kanye nezikhathi zokukhishwa kwesici
Izigameko zokusebenza ziphinda zenzeke ngoba i-telemetry ayiphelele noma ihlukanisiwe
impactSignals: Isikhathi sokuhola izinguquko siyaqhubeka nokwanda naphezu kokusetshenziswa kwe-automation
Shintsha ama-spikes wesilinganiso sokwehluleka ngezikhathi zokulethwa kwevolumu ephezulu
Ukukhiqizwa konjiniyela kuyancipha ngenxa yokungqubuzana kwamathuluzi nokushintsha umongo

approach.overview: Sisungula imodeli yepulatifomu yonjiniyela yangaphakathi enezifanekiso zamapayipi ezisebenzisekayo, ukubusa okuqhutshwa yinqubomgomo, nokubonwa okugcwele komjikelezo wempilo.

pillars.title: Izifanekiso ze-Golden Path Pipeline
pillars.detail: Imidwebo ye-CI / CD esebenzisekayo ilinganisa ukwakha, ukuhlola, ukuhlolwa kwezokuphepha, nokuthunyelwa komsebenzi.

pillars.title: I-API ye-Platform ne-Self-Service
pillars.detail: Amaqembu ahlinzeka ngezindawo futhi akhiphe ingqalasizinda ngokusebenzisa izixhumanisi ezilawulwayo.

pillars.title: Ukuthembeka Impendulo Loops
pillars.detail: Ukuthambekela kwezigameko, impilo ye-SLO, kanye nokuthunyelwa kwe-telemetry kwazisa inqubo eqhubekayo nokuthuthukiswa kwezakhiwo.

principles.overview: Ukwakhiwa kwethu kwe-DevOps kuqondanisa ijubane lokulethwa nokuphatha ngokuzenzekelayo izilawuli nokunciphisa umsebenzi wokusebenza owodwa.

items.title: Konke njengekhodi yenguqulo
items.detail: Amapayipi, ingqalasizinda, kanye nemithetho yenqubomgomo ilawulwa ekulawulweni komthombo wokucwaningwa nokuphindaphinda.

items.title: Ukuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo
items.detail: Ukuhlolwa kwekhwalithi, ukuphepha, nokusebenza kuhlanganiswe kuzo zonke izigaba ukuthola ubungozi kusenesikhathi.

items.title: Umthwalo wepulatifomu owabiwe
items.detail: Amaqembu epulatifomu ahlinzeka ngamakhono omgwaqo ogandayiwe ngenkathi amaqembu emikhiqizo egcina ubunikazi bokulethwa.

breakdown.title: Ukuhlolwa kwepulatifomu
breakdown.summary: Sihlola uchungechunge lwakho lwamanje lokulethwa kwesoftware ukukhomba amaphuzu obungozi nezingqinamba zejubane.
deliverables: Imephu yokuhamba komsebenzi yokulethwa kwesimo samanje

breakdown.title: I-Pipeline ne-Automation Build
breakdown.summary: Sisebenzisa i-CI / CD ethembekile, amasango ekhwalithi, kanye nokuzenzekelayo kwengqalasizinda yokukhishwa okungaguquguquki.

breakdown.title: Sebenzisa futhi uthuthukise
breakdown.summary: Sisungula ama-loops wokubuka nokuphatha asekela ukuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo kokulethwa.

cta.title: Ukusheshisa Ukulethwa Kwakho
cta.description: Nciphisa ukungqubuzana kokukhishwa futhi uthuthukise ukuthembeka ngemikhuba evuthiwe ye-DevOps.

hero.title: Ukuguqulwa kwedijithali neqhinga
hero.description: Ukwelulekwa kwamasu nokusekelwa kokwenziwa ukuze kuthuthukiswe amapulatifomu, amaqembu, namamodeli okusebenza.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Lapho izinhlelo zokuguqulwa zilahlekelwa khona umfutho nokuzethemba kwabaphathi

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esihumusha ngayo isu libe ushintsho olusebenzayo, olusekelwa ubuchwepheshe

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Imodeli yokusebenza nezinketho zepulatifomu ezivikela imiphumela yokuguqulwa

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Ukuguqulwa okuhleliwe kusuka encazelweni yamasu kuya kunani lebhizinisi elilinganiswayo

problem.overview: Imizamo yedijithali ivame ukuqala ngenhloso eqinile kepha yehluleka ukuguqula ibe yimiphumela yokulethwa ngenxa yobunikazi obungacacile, amathuluzi angaxhunyiwe, nezinto eziza kuqala ezincintisanayo.
painPoints: Amamephu omgwaqo wokuguqulwa achazwa kodwa awahunyushelwa ekuphathweni kokulethwa
Izinto eziza kuqala ebhizinisini nasezobunjiniyela ziyahlukahluka ngemuva kwemijikelezo yokuqala yokuhlela
Amamodeli wokusebenza wefa avimbela ukwamukelwa kwemikhuba yesimanje yokulethwa kwemikhiqizo
impactSignals: Ukusetshenziswa kohlelo kukhuphuka ngenkathi ukunyakaza kwamasu e-KPI kuhlala kuyisicabalike
Imizamo iphuthelwa amaphuzu we-handoff phakathi kwamasu, ukwakhiwa, nokwenziwa
Amaqembu athola ukukhathala kwenguquko ngenani elilinganiselwe lebhizinisi

approach.overview: Sihlanganisa ukwelulekwa kwamasu nokwakhiwa kokulethwa, ukuqondanisa ukwakheka kwemodeli yokusebenza, ikhono lepulatifomu, kanye ne-cadence yokwenziwa ngezinhloso ezilinganiselwayo.

pillars.title: Ukubekwa phambili kwe-Value Stream
pillars.detail: Silandelana imizamo ngokususelwa kumthelela webhizinisi olinganiswayo kanye nezingqinamba zokuncika kwezobuchwepheshe.

pillars.title: Target Operating Model Design
pillars.detail: Izindima, ukuphatha, kanye namalungelo ezinqumo achazwa ukusekela ukwenziwa okusheshayo kuwo wonke amaqembu ebhizinisi nobuchwepheshe.

pillars.title: Ukuphathwa Kwephothifoliyo
pillars.detail: Inqubekela phambili yenguquko ilawulwa ngamaphuzu okuhlola axhunyiwe nge-KPI kanye nokulawulwa kobungozi bezinga lephothifoliyo.

principles.overview: Ukwakhiwa kwethu kwenguquko kugcizelela ukuthuthukiswa kwesimanje nokuphendula okucacile, ukugwema ukubhala kabusha okuphazamisayo ngaphandle kwesizathu sebhizinisi.

items.title: Ukuqondaniswa Kwamakhono Okuhweba
items.detail: Izinguquko zobuchwepheshe zihlelwe ngokuzungeze amakhono ahambisana ngqo nemali engenayo, ikhwalithi yesevisi, noma ukusebenza kahle kwezindleko.

items.title: Isu lepulatifomu elihlanganisiwe
items.detail: Izingxenye zepulatifomu zikhethwe ukusebenzisana ukusekela ukufuduka kwezigaba nokuzivumelanisa ngokushesha.

items.title: Ukubusa nge-Delivery Cadence
items.detail: Izinkundla zezinqumo namaphuzu okulawula afakiwe emijikelezweni ye-sprint nekota, ayiphathwa njengamathrekhi ahlukile e-bureaucratic.

breakdown.title: Ukuqondanisa Amasu
breakdown.summary: Sivumelanisa izinto eziza kuqala zobuholi nezinhloso zedijithali ukudala isiqondiso sokuguqulwa okwabiwe.

breakdown.title: Ipulani Yokubulawa
breakdown.summary: Sichaza imodeli yokusebenza ehlosiwe, izindinganiso zokwakha, kanye nokulandelana kokuqaliswa kwezigaba.

breakdown.title: Ushintsho nokugcwaliseka kwenani
breakdown.summary: Sishayela ukwamukelwa, silandelela ukunyakaza kwe-KPI, futhi sithuthukise imizamo ngokususelwa emiphumeleni yokulethwa.

cta.title: Qala Uhambo Lwakho Lokuguqulwa
cta.description: Zulazula ushintsho ngezinto eziza kuqala ezicacile nezinhlelo zokulethwa ezisebenzayo.

hero.title: I-IoT ne-Edge Computing
hero.description: Izinhlelo ezixhunyiwe kusuka kudivayisi kuya efwini, ngamapayipi we-telemetry nobuhlakani bomkhawulo wesilinganiso sezimboni.

problem.title: Ukuhlelwa kwenkinga yebhizinisi
problem.subtitle: Kungani izinhlelo zedivayisi exhunyiwe zehluleka ukukala ngaphezu kokuthunyelwa komshayeli

approach.title: Indlela Yobunjiniyela
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiklama ngayo izinhlelo ze-IoT eziphephile, ezisebenzayo kusuka ku-firmware yedivayisi kuya kuma-API efwini

principles.title: Izimiso Zokwakha
principles.subtitle: Imithetho yokuklama i-Edge-to-cloud yokuthembeka, i-latency, nokuphathwa kwemikhumbi

capabilities.title: Izixazululo ze-IoT
capabilities.subtitle: Xhuma, qapha futhi uthuthukise amadivayisi akho

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwesevisi
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela esiletha ngayo izinhlelo ezixhunyiwe kusuka kumadivayisi onqenqemeni kuya kubuhlakani befu

problem.overview: Imizamo ye-IoT ivame ukufakazela ukwenzeka kwezobuchwepheshe kubashayeli bezindiza kepha yehluleka esikalini ngenxa yokuxhumeka okungathembeki, ukulawulwa kwemikhumbi ebuthakathaka, nokuhlanganiswa okungalungile nokuhamba komsebenzi kwebhizinisi.
painPoints: Ukungena kwedivayisi nokuphathwa komjikelezo wempilo kuhlala kuyincwadi futhi kuthambekele kumaphutha
Amapayipi we-telemetry akhiqiza idatha yokusebenza enomsindo, engaphelele, noma ebambezelekile
Umyalo Okukude kanye nezibuyekezo ze-firmware ziletha ingozi yokuphepha nokuphepha
impactSignals: Izindawo zokushayela ziyaphumelela, kepha izikhathi zokukhiqizwa zishelela ngokuphindaphindiwe
Amaqembu okusebenza ensimini asabela ezigamekweni ngaphandle kokubonakala kokubikezela
Izinhlelo zebhizinisi azikwazi ukusebenzisa ngokuthembekile ubuhlakani bedivayisi ngesikhathi sangempela

approach.overview: Sakha amapulatifomu e-IoT njengezinhlelo ezilawulwayo ezisatshalazwayo, sihlanganisa amazinga aphephile wesikhathi sokusebenza, ukungena okuqhutshwa umcimbi, nokuphathwa kokusebenza ngezinga lemikhumbi.

pillars.title: Ukuphathwa Komjikelezo Wokuphila Kwedivayisi Ephephile
pillars.detail: Ukuhlinzekwa, ubunikazi, ukujikeleza kokhiye, kanye nezibuyekezo ze-firmware zizenzakalelayo ukunciphisa ubungozi bokusebenza.

pillars.title: Ukwakhiwa kwe-Telemetry eqhutshwa ngumcimbi
pillars.detail: Amapayipi wokusakaza ajwayelekile, aqinisekise, futhi ahambisa imicimbi yedivayisi yokuhlaziya nokulawula ngesikhathi sangempela.

pillars.title: Indiza yokulawula imisebenzi ye-Fleet
pillars.detail: Ukuqapha, ukuxwayisa, kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi komyalo okukude kunikeza ukuqapha okuthembekile kwempahla esatshalalisiwe.

principles.overview: Ukwakhiwa kwethu kwe-IoT kulinganisa izinqumo ezinqenqemeni ze-latency ephansi ngokuphathwa okuphakathi, ukubona, nokuhambisana nokuphepha.

items.title: Ukuzimela Okunqenqemeni Ngokudidiyelwa Kwamafu
items.detail: Imisebenzi ebucayi yendawo iyaqhubeka ngesikhathi sokuwohloka kwenethiwekhi ngenkathi ivumelanisa isimo nezinhlelo zamafu uma zitholakala.

items.title: Izikimu Zomcimbi Ezinkontileka
items.detail: Amaqembu amadivayisi nepulatifomu asebenzisa ama-schemas alawulwayo ukugcina ukungaguquguquki kwe-telemetry kuzo zonke izinguqulo.

items.title: Ukuphepha Kwedivayisi Ye-Zero-Trust
items.detail: Ukuqinisekiswa okuhlangene, ilungelo elincane, nokuthuthwa okubethelwe kuphoqelelwa kuwo wonke ukuxhumana kwedivayisi.

breakdown.title: Isu ledivayisi ne-Edge
breakdown.summary: Sichaza amaphethini okuxhuma, amazinga wesikhathi sokusebenza onqenqemeni, kanye nokuhlinzekwa okuphephile kwamadivayisi ensimini.
deliverables: Isikhathi sokusebenza se-Edge kanye nepulani yokuthunyelwa

breakdown.title: Telemetry & Control Plane
breakdown.summary: Sakha amapayipi athwebula imicimbi, alingise amawele edijithali, futhi sinike amandla ukuhamba komsebenzi kokulawula okukude.
deliverables: Real-time ingestion and event schema design
Digital twin and asset model implementation

breakdown.title: Imisebenzi & Isikali
breakdown.summary: Sisebenzisa ukuphathwa kwemikhumbi nokulawulwa kokuthembeka kwezindawo ze-IoT zokukhiqiza.
deliverables: Uhlelo lokusekelwa komjikelezo wokuphila kanye nohlelo lokusekelwa komjikelezo wokuphila

cta.title: Xhuma izisetshenziswa zakho
cta.description: Yakha izixazululo ezinokwethenjelwa ze-IoT ezilungele izindawo zangempela zokukhiqiza.
